title: stylidium crassifolium subsp. elongatum
intro: Stylidium crassifolium subsp. elongatum, commonly known as the elongated triggerplant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used to treat various health issues. The leaves of the elongated triggerplant have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
